title: Application State Machine, Commands, and Recovery
description: Solve can run during generation, pause is a boolean with ambiguous meaning, controls disagree with state, and errors leave the app unusable. Learners cumulatively produce explicit application transition table through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Define idle, generating, ready, solving, paused, completed, cancelled, failed, and closing states with owned data.
Admit commands through an explicit current-state transition table with effects and rejection feedback.
Derive enabled controls, labels, focus targets, status, and progress from state rather than mutating them independently.
